challenge.title: Korak 5
challenge.description:
Usluga je bila greške dobra, pa je grupa odlučila da ostavi 25% napojnica. Da biste izračunali procenat u Python, možete ukupan iznos pomnožiti sa decimalnim ekvivalentom tog procenta.

Primer, da biste dobili 10 procenata vrednosti, pomnožili biste sa 0.10 koristeći operator *:

tax = total * 0.10

Definiši parametar nazvan tip i postavi vrednost na rezultat množenja running_total sa 0.25.

Konačno, koristi print() da prikaže niz slova Tip amount: praćen razmakom i vrednošću tvog parametra tip.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
running_total = 0

num_of_friends = 4

appetizers = 37.89
main_courses = 57.34
desserts = 39.39
drinks = 64.21

running_total += appetizers + main_courses + desserts + drinks
print('Total bill so far:', running_total)

tests.text: Vaš parametar za tip treba da bude rezultat running_total * 0.25.
Trebalo bi da ispišete niz znakova Tip amount: praćen razmakom i kriterijumom tip.
tests.testString:
({
    test: () => runPython(`
import io, contextlib, re

buffer = io.StringIO()
with contextlib.redirect_stdout(buffer):
    exec(_code)

match = re.search(r"Tip amount: ([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)", buffer.getvalue())

assert match
assert abs(float(match.group(1)) - ((37.89 + 57.34 + 39.39 + 64.21) * 0.25)) < 1e-6
`)
})

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
running_total = 0

num_of_friends = 4

appetizers = 37.89
main_courses = 57.34
desserts = 39.39
drinks = 64.21

running_total += appetizers + main_courses + desserts + drinks
print('Total bill so far:', running_total)

tip = running_total * 0.25
print('Tip amount:', tip)

running_total += tip
print('Total with tip:', running_total)

final_bill = running_total / num_of_friends
print('Bill per person:', final_bill)

each_pays = round(final_bill, 2)
print('Each person pays:', each_pays)
